name: Mississippi Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
Topping
6 1/4 ounces miniature marshmallows
Frosting
1/2 cup butter -- melted
1/3 cup milk
3 tablespoons cocoa
2 cups powdered sugar
1 teaspoon vanilla
Preheat oven to 350° F. Prepare a 13x9 pan.
Combine cake ingredients and pour into the prepared pan. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
Cover with marshmallows and return to the oven for 3 minutes.
Combine frosting ingredients and frost over marshmallows while still warm.
Cool before cutting.
